title: spyridium riparium
intro: Spyridium riparium, also known as the coastal spyridium, is a plant native to Australia and is part of the Celastraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Spyridium riparium are believed to include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating skin irritations, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea or infused in oil to utilize its medicinal properties, although its preparation and use should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
